title: App Settings - General - Licenses - Source
scenario: Tapping each Source link under App Settings > General > Licenses opens github.com with the correct license page
steps: Tap the first Source link under a license entry
Verify the browser opens to github.com with the correct page for that license
Repeat steps 5–7 for each remaining Source link
expected: Each Source link opens github.com to the correct, individual license page.
